# terrible_community_general_pushbullet (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String) Push bullet API token.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `title` (String) Title of the notification.

### Optional

- `body` (String) Body of the notification, for example details of the fault you are alerting.
- `channel` (String) The channel TAG you wish to broadcast a push notification, as seen on the "My Channels" > "Edit your channel" at Pushbullet page.
- `device` (String) The device NAME you wish to send a push notification, as seen on the Pushbullet main page.
- `push_type` (String) Thing you wish to push.
- `url` (String) URL field, used when `push_type=link`.
